questions.title: Customer Countries
questions.prompt: List each distinct country that has at least one customer. Sort the results alphabetically by country name.
questions.query: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM SQL_STORE.customers ORDER BY Country;

questions.title: Shipper Directory
questions.prompt: Retrieve the name and phone number of every shipper. Order results by shipper name.
questions.query: SELECT ShipperName, Phone FROM SQL_STORE.shippers ORDER BY ShipperName;

questions.title: Products per Category
questions.prompt: For each category, return the category name and the number of products it contains (label the count ProductCount). Order by category name ascending.
questions.query: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM SQL_STORE.Categories c JOIN SQL_STORE.products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName ORDER BY c.CategoryName;

questions.title: Orders in 1996
questions.prompt: List all orders placed during 1996, showing OrderID, CustomerID, and OrderDate. Sort by OrderDate ascending.
questions.query: SELECT OrderID, CustomerID, OrderDate FROM SQL_STORE.orders WHERE YEAR(OrderDate) = 1996 ORDER BY OrderDate;

questions.title: Top 5 Customers by Order Volume
questions.prompt: Find the top 5 customers who have placed the most orders. Show their CustomerName and order count (labelled OrderCount), highest first.
questions.query: SELECT TOP 5 c.CustomerName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM SQL_STORE.customers c JOIN SQL_STORE.orders o ON c.CustomerID = o.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC;

questions.title: Movies by MPAA Rating
questions.prompt: For each MPAA rating, return the MPAA_Rating_ID and the count of movies with that rating (label the count MovieCount). Order by MPAA_Rating_ID.
questions.query: SELECT MPAA_Rating_ID, COUNT(*) AS MovieCount FROM SQL_MOVIE.Movie GROUP BY MPAA_Rating_ID ORDER BY MPAA_Rating_ID;

questions.title: Distributor List
questions.prompt: List all movie distributors ordered alphabetically by their name.
questions.query: SELECT Distributor_Name FROM SQL_MOVIE.Distributor ORDER BY Distributor_Name;

questions.title: Top 5 Movies by Worldwide Box Office
questions.prompt: Show the title and worldwide box office gross of the top 5 highest-grossing movies, sorted from highest to lowest.
questions.query: SELECT TOP 5 Title, Box_Office_WorldWide FROM SQL_MOVIE.Movie ORDER BY Box_Office_WorldWide DESC;

questions.title: MCU Phase 1 Movies with Character Family
questions.prompt: List each MCU Phase 1 movie with its title and character family name. Sort results by release date ascending.
questions.query: SELECT m.Title, cf.Character_Family_Name FROM SQL_MOVIE.Movie m JOIN SQL_MOVIE.Character_Family cf ON m.Character_Family_ID = cf.Character_Family_ID WHERE m.MCU_Phase = 1 ORDER BY m.Release_Date;

questions.title: Average Box Office by Distributor
questions.prompt: For each distributor, calculate the average worldwide box office revenue across their movies (label it AvgBoxOffice). Order from highest to lowest average.
questions.query: SELECT d.Distributor_Name, AVG(m.Box_Office_WorldWide) AS AvgBoxOffice FROM SQL_MOVIE.Distributor d JOIN SQL_MOVIE.Movie m ON d.Distributor_ID = m.Distributor_ID GROUP BY d.Distributor_Name ORDER BY AvgBoxOffice DESC;
